scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @pgmd/shared && npm run build --workspace @pgmd/parsing && npm run build --workspace pgmd-backend && npm run build --workspace pgmd-frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @pgmd/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @pgmd/parsing && npm run typecheck --workspace pgmd-backend && npm run typecheck --workspace pgmd-frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace pgmd-backend && npm run test --workspace pgmd-frontend
